'''yoranaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:icebergy|icebergy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-r-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:icebergy|icebergy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yoranaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yoranithi|yoranithi]] || [[word:yoraniji|yoraniji]] || [[word:yoranishi|yoranishi]] || [[word:yoraniki|yoraniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yoranuthuthu|yoranuthuthu]] || [[word:yoranujuju|yoranujuju]] || [[word:yoranushushu|yoranushushu]] || [[word:yoranukuku|yoranukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yoranuthu|yoranuthu]] || [[word:yoranuju|yoranuju]] || [[word:yoranushu|yoranushu]] || [[word:yoranuku|yoranuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yoranufthuf|yoranufthuf]] || [[word:yoranufjuf|yoranufjuf]] || [[word:yoranufshuf|yoranufshuf]] || [[word:yoranufkuf|yoranufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yoranethe|yoranethe]] || [[word:yoraneje|yoraneje]] || [[word:yoraneshe|yoraneshe]] || [[word:yoraneke|yoraneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yoranothotho|yoranothotho]] || [[word:yoranojojo|yoranojojo]] || [[word:yoranoshosho|yoranoshosho]] || [[word:yoranokoko|yoranokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yoranotho|yoranotho]] || [[word:yoranojo|yoranojo]] || [[word:yoranosho|yoranosho]] || [[word:yoranoko|yoranoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yoranofthof|yoranofthof]] || [[word:yoranofjof|yoranofjof]] || [[word:yoranofshof|yoranofshof]] || [[word:yoranofkof|yoranofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfthÃŸf|yoranÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfjÃŸf|yoranÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfshÃŸf|yoranÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfkÃŸf|yoranÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yoranÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yoranÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yoranÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yoranÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfthÃŸf|yoranÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfjÃŸf|yoranÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfshÃŸf|yoranÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfkÃŸf|yoranÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfthÃŸf|yoranÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfjÃŸf|yoranÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfshÃŸf|yoranÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yoranÃŸfkÃŸf|yoranÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yoranÃḊthÃḊ|yoranÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yoranÃḊjÃḊ|yoranÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yoranÃḊshÃḊ|yoranÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yoranÃḊkÃḊ|yoranÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yoranathatha|yoranathatha]] || [[word:yoranajaja|yoranajaja]] || [[word:yoranashasha|yoranashasha]] || [[word:yoranakaka|yoranakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yoranatha|yoranatha]] || [[word:yoranaja|yoranaja]] || [[word:yoranasha|yoranasha]] || [[word:yoranaka|yoranaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yoranafthaf|yoranafthaf]] || [[word:yoranafjaf|yoranafjaf]] || [[word:yoranafshaf|yoranafshaf]] || [[word:yoranafkaf|yoranafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yoranasha|yoranasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yoranshÃḋsha|yoranshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yoranrosha|yoranrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yoranmusha|yoranmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yoranyasha|yoranyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyorankshÃḋsha|goyorankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyorankrosha|goyorankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyorankmusha|goyorankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyorankyasha|goyorankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yoraranasha|yoraranasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yoraranshÃḋsha|yoraranshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yoraranrosha|yoraranrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yoraranmusha|yoraranmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yoraranyasha|yoraranyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyorarankshÃḋsha|goyorarankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyorarankrosha|goyorarankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyorarankmusha|goyorarankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyorarankyasha|goyorarankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yerÃḊnasha|yerÃḊnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yerÃḊnshÃḋsha|yerÃḊnshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yerÃḊnrosha|yerÃḊnrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yerÃḊnmusha|yerÃḊnmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yerÃḊnyasha|yerÃḊnyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyerÃḊnkshÃḋsha|goyerÃḊnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyerÃḊnkrosha|goyerÃḊnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyerÃḊnkmusha|goyerÃḊnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyerÃḊnkyasha|goyerÃḊnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yorfanasha|yorfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yorfanshÃḋsha|yorfanshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yorfanrosha|yorfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yorfanmusha|yorfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yorfanyasha|yorfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyorfankshÃḋsha|goyorfankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyorfankrosha|goyorfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyorfankmusha|goyorfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyorfankyasha|goyorfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
